notes: Active-duty military officer transitioning out. 'Captain' rank in the name line is NOT a name part (should be stripped along with 'USAF' suffix). Section headers include 'CAREER OBJECTIVE', 'CLEARANCES' (the clearance is sensitive but not a cert — should NOT be in certifications). Title pattern: 'Captain — Cyber Operations Officer' on line 1, 'Joint Base ... | Date' on line 2. Three roles all at the same employer (USAF) but different units.
